description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, caches the node_modules/ directory, and runs a before_script that updates apk, installs jq and yarn, and runs yarn install. Define two stages: publish and release. In the publish stage add a publish:npm job that runs only on tag names matching the pattern vX.Y.Z (and not on branches), executes `echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}'>.npmrc` then `npm publish --access=public` to publish the package to npm. In the release stage add a release:docker.io job that also runs only on those tags, runs `export PACKAGE_VERSION=$(cat package.json | jq -r .version)`, logs into Docker Hub with `docker login -u "$DOCKER_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD"`, builds the image with `docker build --pull -t "$DOCKER_REGISTRY_IMAGE" .` and pushes it with `docker push "$DOCKER_REGISTRY_IMAGE"`. Also in the release stage add a release:gitlab job with the same tag filter that runs `export PACKAGE_VERSION=$(cat package.json | jq -r .version)`, logs into the GitLab Container Registry using `docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" $CI_REGISTRY`, builds the image with `docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" .` and pushes it with `docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE"`.
